title: ASE agent-discovery manifest (openclaw-skills/1.0)
description: Shape of the agent-facing catalog manifests generated by the ase-marketplace-layer plugin and served at the site root: openclaw.json, codex.json, skills.json. The same content, shaped for different agent runtimes.

source.description: Canonical site the manifest was generated from.

generated.description: UTC date the manifest was regenerated (manifests refresh daily).

total.description: Count of skills in the manifest; must match the WordPress live total (repo/site parity invariant).

slug.description: Stable identifier; matches skills/<slug>/ in the public repo.

framework.description: Primary agent framework the skill targets.

verification.description: Trust tier. security_reviewed is the public trust signal and is gated by the verification rules (boilerplate is never published as security_reviewed).
